rule_text: AP Works contractors may opt for the Composing Scheme under Section 5(g) of APGST Act for sales/works-contract tax — those opting are subject to 2% Tax Deduction at Source (TDS) on total contract value; departments shall NOT insist on tax-clearance certificates and no separate tax assessment is needed.
verification_method: Check tender SCC contains 2% TDS option clause + waiver of tax-clearance-certificate insistence

rule_text: AP works contractors may submit work bills once a month; payment must be made within reasonable time after quantity-and-quality check; final payment shall NOT be delayed for want of Quality Control certification.
verification_method: Check tender SCC: monthly bill cycle + final-payment-not-delayed-for-QC clause

rule_text: AP Executive Engineers are accountable for prompt processing of payments for excess quantities — failure invites disciplinary action; Chief Engineers must ensure Quality Control Wing issues timely certificates on pain of disciplinary action.
verification_method: Check tender file: excess-quantity payment chain + QC-wing accountability mechanism

rule_text: For all AP works costing more than Rs.2 crore, contractor must submit a Quality Plan AND show proof of owning a Quality Laboratory or having tie-up with an established Quality Laboratory; required QC test equipment must be specified in tender documents.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimatedValue>20000000
verification_method: For ECV > Rs.2cr: check tender requires Quality Plan + QC-lab proof + equipment list in SCC

rule_text: ISO certified AP works contractors should be encouraged AND given preference in award of works.
verification_method: Check tender BDS: ISO 9001 certification carries scoring/preference weight in evaluation matrix
